# bboutools

`bboutools` is an R package to estimate the annual survival, recruitment
and population growth for boreal caribou populations using Bayesian and
Maximum Likelihood models with fixed and random effects. It was
developed to facilitate direct comparison of estimates across
jurisdictions.

## Installation

To install the latest development version:

``` R
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("poissonconsulting/bboutools")
```

## Introduction

### Survival

`bboutools` accepts survival data in a specific format.

``` R
library(tibble) # for printing data frames
#> Warning: package 'tibble' was built under R version 4.5.3
library(ggplot2) # for plotting

library(bboudata) # for boreal caribou datasets
#> 
#> Attaching package: 'bboudata'
#> The following object is masked from 'package:bboutools':
#> 
#>     licensing_md
library(bboutools)

surv_data <- bboudata::bbousurv_a
head(surv_data)
#> # A tibble: 6 × 6
#>   PopulationName  Year Month StartTotal MortalitiesCertain MortalitiesUncertain
#>   <chr>          <int> <int>      <int>              <int>                <int>
#> 1 A               1986     1          0                  0                    0
#> 2 A               1986     2          8                  0                    0
#> 3 A               1986     3          8                  0                    0
#> 4 A               1986     4          8                  0                    0
#> 5 A               1986     5          8                  0                    0
#> 6 A               1986     6          8                  0                    0
```

The survival model, which includes a random effect of month, is fitted
using
[`bb_fit_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_fit_survival.md).
To achieve convergence increase `nthin`.

``` R
set.seed(99)
surv_fit <- bb_fit_survival(surv_data, quiet = TRUE)
glance(surv_fit)
#> # A tibble: 1 × 8
#>       n     K nchains niters nthin   ess  rhat converged
#>   <int> <int>   <int>  <int> <dbl> <int> <dbl> <lgl>    
#> 1   363     6       3   1000    10   111  1.03 TRUE
```

Predictions can then be generated using
[`bb_predict_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_survival.md).

``` R
surv_pred <- bb_predict_survival(surv_fit)
surv_pred
#> # A tibble: 32 × 6
#>    PopulationName CaribouYear Month estimate lower upper
#>    <fct>                <int> <int>    <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
#>  1 A                     1985    NA    0.872 0.762 0.947
#>  2 A                     1986    NA    0.881 0.791 0.952
#>  3 A                     1987    NA    0.841 0.645 0.908
#>  4 A                     1988    NA    0.887 0.813 0.96 
#>  5 A                     1989    NA    0.874 0.785 0.943
#>  6 A                     1990    NA    0.872 0.785 0.936
#>  7 A                     1991    NA    0.877 0.801 0.936
#>  8 A                     1992    NA    0.889 0.822 0.956
#>  9 A                     1993    NA    0.87  0.793 0.927
#> 10 A                     1994    NA    0.849 0.756 0.909
#> # ℹ 22 more rows
```

And plotted using
[`bb_plot_year()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year.md)

``` R
bb_plot_year_survival(surv_pred) +
  expand_limits(y = c(0, 1))
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-5-1.png)

The survival in each month can be plotted using
[`bb_plot_month()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_month.md)

``` R
bb_plot_month_survival(surv_fit)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-6-1.png)

These estimates represent the annual survival rate if that month lasted
the whole year.

### Recruitment

The equivalent functions for recruitment data are

``` R
recruit_data <- bboudata::bbourecruit_a
head(recruit_data)
#> # A tibble: 6 × 9
#>   PopulationName  Year Month   Day  Cows Bulls UnknownAdults Yearlings Calves
#>   <chr>          <int> <int> <int> <int> <int>         <int>     <int>  <int>
#> 1 A               1990     3     9     1     1             0         0      0
#> 2 A               1990     3     9     5     1             0         0      0
#> 3 A               1990     3     9     4     1             0         0      0
#> 4 A               1990     3     9     2     0             0         0      0
#> 5 A               1990     3     9     6     0             0         0      0
#> 6 A               1990     3     9     4     1             0         0      0

set.seed(99)
recruit_fit <- bb_fit_recruitment(recruit_data, quiet = TRUE)

bb_plot_year_recruitment(recruit_fit)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-7-1.png)

### Population Growth

The function
[`bb_predict_growth()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_growth.md)
predicts the annual population growth (lambda) rate from the survival
and recruitment models.

``` R
lambda <- bb_predict_growth(surv_fit, recruit_fit)
#> Filtering to shared population and year combinations. CaribouYears in survival only: 1985, 1986, 1987, 1988, 2016.
bb_plot_year_growth(lambda)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-8-1.png)

[`bb_predict_population_change()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_population_change.md)
calculates the population change (%) with uncertainty as the cumulative
product of population growth.

``` R
change <- bb_predict_population_change(surv_fit, recruit_fit)
#> Filtering to shared population and year combinations. CaribouYears in survival only: 1985, 1986, 1987, 1988, 2016.
bb_plot_year_population_change(change)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-9-1.png)

## Information

Additional information is available from the [bboutools
website](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/), which includes
the following articles:  
- [Get
Started](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/articles/bboutools.html).  
- [Analytic Methods for Estimation of Boreal Caribou Survival,
Recruitment and Population
Growth](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/articles/bbmethods.html).  
- [Prior Selection and
Influence](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/articles/priors.html). -
[Multi-Population Analysis and Other
Extensions](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/articles/extensions.html).

There is also a [user-friendly graphical
interface](https://poissonconsulting.shinyapps.io/bboushiny/), called
[`bboushiny`](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bboushiny), for non-R
users.

## bbou Suite

`bboutools` is part of the bbou suite of tools. Other packages in this
suite include:

- [bboudata](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bboudata)
- [bbouretro](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bbouretro)
- [bboushiny](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bboushiny)
- [bbousims](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bbousims)

## Contribution

Please report any
[issues](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bboutools/issues).

[Pull requests](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bboutools/pulls)
are always welcome.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the `bboutools` project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

## Licensing

Copyright 2022-2023 Integrated Ecological Research and Poisson
Consulting Ltd.  
Copyright 2024 Province of Alberta

The documentation is released under the [CC BY 4.0
License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

The code is released under the [Apache License
2.0](https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)

# Package index

## Fitting Models

Fit Bayesian and Maximum Likelihood survival and recruitment models.

- [`bb_fit_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_fit_survival.md)
  : Fit Survival Model
- [`bb_fit_survival_ml()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_fit_survival_ml.md)
  : Fit Survival Model with Maximum Likelihood
- [`bb_fit_recruitment()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_fit_recruitment.md)
  : Fit Recruitment Model
- [`bb_fit_recruitment_ml()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_fit_recruitment_ml.md)
  : Fit Recruitment Model with Maximum Likelihood

## Priors

Specify Bayesian priors for model parameters.

- [`bb_priors_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_priors_survival.md)
  : Survival model default priors
- [`bb_priors_survival_national()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_priors_survival_national.md)
  : Disturbance-informed national survival priors
- [`bb_priors_recruitment()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_priors_recruitment.md)
  : Recruitment model default priors
- [`bb_priors_recruitment_national()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_priors_recruitment_national.md)
  : Disturbance-informed national recruitment priors

## Predictions

Predict survival, recruitment, calf-cow ratio, growth, and population
change.

- [`bb_predict_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_survival.md)
  : Predict Survival
- [`bb_predict_survival_samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_survival_samples.md)
  : Predict Survival Samples
- [`bb_predict_recruitment()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_recruitment.md)
  : Predict Recruitment
- [`bb_predict_recruitment_samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_recruitment_samples.md)
  : Predict Recruitment Samples
- [`bb_predict_calf_cow_ratio()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_calf_cow_ratio.md)
  : Predict Calf-Cow Ratio
- [`bb_predict_calf_cow_ratio_samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_calf_cow_ratio_samples.md)
  : Predict Calf-Cow Ratio Samples
- [`bb_predict_growth()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_growth.md)
  [`bb_predict_lambda()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_growth.md)
  : Predict Population Growth Lambda
- [`bb_predict_growth_samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_growth_samples.md)
  : Predict Population Growth Lambda Samples
- [`bb_predict_population_change()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_population_change.md)
  : Predict Population Change
- [`bb_predict_population_change_samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_population_change_samples.md)
  : Predict Population Change Samples

## Trend Predictions

Predict trend lines for models fit with year_trend = TRUE.

- [`bb_predict_survival_trend()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_survival_trend.md)
  : Predict Survival Trend
- [`bb_predict_survival_trend_samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_survival_trend_samples.md)
  : Predict Survival Trend Samples
- [`bb_predict_recruitment_trend()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_recruitment_trend.md)
  : Predict Recruitment Trend
- [`bb_predict_recruitment_trend_samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_recruitment_trend_samples.md)
  : Predict Recruitment Trend Samples
- [`bb_predict_calf_cow_ratio_trend()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_calf_cow_ratio_trend.md)
  : Predict Calf-Cow Ratio Trend
- [`bb_predict_calf_cow_ratio_trend_samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_calf_cow_ratio_trend_samples.md)
  : Predict Calf-Cow Ratio Trend Samples

## Plotting

Visualize model estimates and trends.

- [`bb_plot_year_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_survival.md)
  : Plot Year Survival
- [`bb_plot_year_recruitment()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_recruitment.md)
  : Plot Year Recruitment
- [`bb_plot_year_calf_cow_ratio()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_calf_cow_ratio.md)
  : Plot Year Calf-Cow Ratio
- [`bb_plot_year_growth()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_growth.md)
  : Plot Year Population Growth
- [`bb_plot_year_population_change()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_population_change.md)
  : Plot Year Population Change
- [`bb_plot_year_trend_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_trend_survival.md)
  : Plot Annual Survival Trend
- [`bb_plot_year_trend_recruitment()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_trend_recruitment.md)
  : Plot Annual Recruitment Trend
- [`bb_plot_year_trend_calf_cow_ratio()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_trend_calf_cow_ratio.md)
  : Plot Annual Calf-Cow Ratio Trend
- [`bb_plot_month_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_month_survival.md)
  : Plot Monthly Survival
- [`bb_plot_year()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year.md)
  : Plot Year
- [`bb_plot_month()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_month.md)
  : Plot Month

## Model Summaries

Extract coefficients, estimates, and model summaries.

- [`reexports`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`augment`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`coef`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`glance`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`logLik`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`nobs`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`predict`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`tidy`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`estimates`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`nchains`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`npars`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`nterms`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`niters`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`rhat`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`esr`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`converged`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`pars`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  : Objects exported from other packages

## Convergence Diagnostics

Assess MCMC convergence for Bayesian models.

- [`reexports`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`augment`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`coef`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`glance`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`logLik`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`nobs`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`predict`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`tidy`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`estimates`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`nchains`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`npars`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`nterms`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`niters`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`rhat`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`esr`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`converged`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`pars`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  : Objects exported from other packages

## Model Properties

Query model dimensions and extract components.

- [`samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/samples.md)
  : Get MCMC samples
- [`model_code()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/model_code.md)
  : Get Model Code
- [`reexports`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`augment`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`coef`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`glance`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`logLik`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`nobs`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`predict`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`tidy`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`estimates`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`nchains`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`npars`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`nterms`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`niters`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`rhat`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`esr`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`converged`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  [`pars`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/reexports.md)
  : Objects exported from other packages

## Model Code

Build NIMBLE model code.

- [`model_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/model_survival.md)
  : Build Nimble survival model.
- [`model_recruitment()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/model_recruitment.md)
  : Build Nimble recruitment model.

## Deprecated

- [`bb_predict_growth()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_growth.md)
  [`bb_predict_lambda()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_predict_growth.md)
  : Predict Population Growth Lambda

## Utilities

- [`licensing_md()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/licensing_md.md)
  : Licensing Markdown

## S3 Methods

- [`augment(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/augment.bboufit.md)
  : Get Augmented Data from bboufit Object
- [`augment(`*`<bboufit_ml>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/augment.bboufit_ml.md)
  : Get Augmented Data from bboufit_ml Object
- [`bb_plot_month()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_month.md)
  : Plot Month
- [`bb_plot_month_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_month_survival.md)
  : Plot Monthly Survival
- [`bb_plot_year()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year.md)
  : Plot Year
- [`bb_plot_year_calf_cow_ratio()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_calf_cow_ratio.md)
  : Plot Year Calf-Cow Ratio
- [`bb_plot_year_recruitment()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_recruitment.md)
  : Plot Year Recruitment
- [`bb_plot_year_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_survival.md)
  : Plot Year Survival
- [`bb_plot_year_trend_calf_cow_ratio()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_trend_calf_cow_ratio.md)
  : Plot Annual Calf-Cow Ratio Trend
- [`bb_plot_year_trend_recruitment()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_trend_recruitment.md)
  : Plot Annual Recruitment Trend
- [`bb_plot_year_trend_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/bb_plot_year_trend_survival.md)
  : Plot Annual Survival Trend
- [`coef(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/coef.bboufit.md)
  : Get Tidy Tibble from bboufit Object.
- [`coef(`*`<bboufit_ml>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/coef.bboufit_ml.md)
  : Get Tidy Tibble from bboufit_ml Object.
- [`converged(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/converged.bboufit.md)
  : Get Convergence of bboufit Object
- [`converged(`*`<bboufit_ml>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/converged.bboufit_ml.md)
  : Get Convergence of bboufit_ml Object
- [`esr(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/esr.bboufit.md)
  : Get Effective Sample Rate of bboufit Object
- [`estimates(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/estimates.bboufit.md)
  : Estimates for bboufit Object
- [`estimates(`*`<bboufit_ml>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/estimates.bboufit_ml.md)
  : Estimates for bboufit_ml Object
- [`glance(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/glance.bboufit.md)
  : Get a Glance Summary of bboufit Object
- [`glance(`*`<bboufit_ml>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/glance.bboufit_ml.md)
  : Get a Glance Summary of bboufit_ml Object
- [`model_code()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/model_code.md)
  : Get Model Code
- [`nchains(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/nchains.bboufit.md)
  : Get Number of Chains from bboufit Object
- [`niters(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/niters.bboufit.md)
  : Get Number of Iterations from bboufit Object
- [`npars(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/npars.bboufit.md)
  : Get Number of Parameters from bboufit Object
- [`npars(`*`<bboufit_ml>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/npars.bboufit_ml.md)
  : Get Number of Parameters from bboufit_ml Object
- [`nterms(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/nterms.bboufit.md)
  : Get Number of Terms from bboufit Object
- [`nterms(`*`<bboufit_ml>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/nterms.bboufit_ml.md)
  : Get Number of Terms from bboufit_ml Object
- [`pars(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/pars.bboufit.md)
  : Get Parameters from bboufit Object
- [`pars(`*`<bboufit_ml>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/pars.bboufit_ml.md)
  : Get Parameters from bboufit_ml Object
- [`predict(`*`<bboufit_recruitment>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/predict.bboufit_recruitment.md)
  : Predict Recruitment
- [`predict(`*`<bboufit_survival>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/predict.bboufit_survival.md)
  : Predict Survival
- [`rhat(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/rhat.bboufit.md)
  : Get Rhat of bboufit Object
- [`samples()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/samples.md)
  : Get MCMC samples
- [`tidy(`*`<bboufit>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/tidy.bboufit.md)
  : Get Tidy Tibble from bboufit Object.
- [`tidy(`*`<bboufit_ml>`*`)`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/reference/tidy.bboufit_ml.md)
  : Get Tidy Tibble from bboufit_ml Object.

  Influence](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboutools/articles/priors.md):
